DEMONSTRATION DATA ONLY. This dashboard uses synthetic data for analytical methodology review. Not for official policy use.

Medicaid Community Engagement: T-MSIS Analytics Dashboard

Reporting Period State Age Group
Program Context: This dashboard tracks Medicaid recipients enrolled in a Community Engagement (CE) program under the T-MSIS data model. Recipients are expected to log 80 hours/month of participation across community-based organizations (food banks, peer support centers, vocational rehabilitation centers, and others). Data spans 8 states · Oct 2025 – Mar 2026 · 10,000 synthetic recipients. Sections 1–2 cover enrollment and service delivery; Section 3 measures 80-hr compliance; Sections 4–5 assess data quality and fraud indicators. Proof-of-concept — synthetic data only.
